steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: Parallel shortcut: equal slopes. The given line $y = 7x + 4$ has slope $7$, so our line also has slope $7$.

steps.title: Use the given point
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,5)$, so its $y$-intercept is $5$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Slope $7$ and $y$-intercept $5$ give $y=7x+5$. That matches Choice B — $y=7x+5$.
